---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What problem would this feature solve? Who benefits?

**Proposed solution**
How you imagine it working (UI mockups welcome).

**Alternatives considered**
Other ways to solve the same problem.

**Additional context**
Anything else — check the [roadmap](../../README.md#-roadmap) first to avoid duplicates.
